Surname.jp: 忠義を尽くす護衛騎士

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52157_1]</color> chance to increase the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52157_1] turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52157_1]</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52157_1]ターン</color>の間UPさせる。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52157_1]</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52157_1]턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52157_1]</color>的几率使自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52157_1]回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52158_1]</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52158_1] turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52158_1]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52158_1]ターン</color>の間付与する。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52158_1]</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52158_1]턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color> 상태로 만듭니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52158_1]</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52158_1]回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52159_1]</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Attack</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52159_1] turn(s)</color>.\nIncreases damage dealt proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52159_1]</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52159_1]ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52159_1]</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>공격력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52159_1]턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52159_1]</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>攻击力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52159_1]回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nAfter the caster takes their turn, has a <color=#28d9ed>60%</color> chance to Counterattack, until the caster's next turn.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分がターンを獲得した後、次のターンの間<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>の確率で反撃する。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n자신이 턴을 획득한 이후, 다음 턴 동안 <color=#28d9ed>60%</color>의 확률로 반격합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n自身获得回合后,下一回合有<color=#28d9ed>60%</color>的几率发动反击。

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, restores your HP by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 시작 시 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>회복합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,回复自身生命值<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
